stories.title: Future Power Rankings: How all 68 Power 4 college football teams stack up
stories.summary: Coaches, current roster, recruits: Who has the best overall team over the next two seasons?

stories.title: Wemby condemns violence against Spurs fans
stories.summary: Victor Wembanyama was among players on both the Spurs and Knicks to condemn the videos permeating social media of apparent New York fans physically attacking Spurs supporters.

stories.title: Sources: Bengals restructure Burrow's contract
stories.summary: The Cincinnati Bengals have restructured quarterback Joe Burrow's contract, freeing up $10 million in cap space for the upcoming season.

stories.title: Rams' Jackson faces domestic violence charge
stories.summary: Rams left tackle Alaric Jackson was arrested on a felony domestic violence charge Monday night, the Los Angeles Police Department confirmed to ESPN.

stories.title: Texas court sets Sorbsy-NCAA trial for February
stories.summary: The trial for Texas Tech QB Brendan Sorsby vs. the NCAA has been set to start two weeks after the CFP National Championship is scheduled to be played.
